schema.name: Fast Shipment
schema.description: Expedited shipping with guaranteed delivery times, real-time GPS tracking, and 30-40% faster transit times than standard freight. Includes dedicated drivers, priority carrier network, and temperature-controlled options for sensitive goods.

schema.name: Freight Management
schema.description: Comprehensive supply chain optimization including route planning, cost reduction, advanced analytics, multi-modal transportation, and inventory management. Real-time tracking with proactive alerts and condition monitoring.

schema.name: Custom Solutions
schema.description: Tailored logistics strategies for specific business needs with dedicated account management, industry-specific expertise, scalable solutions, and white-glove service for high-value shipments.
